name: First State Bank Of Livingston
description_short: FDIC-insured community bank in Livingston, TX, offering deposit accounts, debit cards, online banking, and loan products since 1910.
description_long:
First State Bank of Livingston is a community bank headquartered in Livingston, Texas, with a documented history spanning over a century. The bank was established in 1910 and positions itself as a locally-rooted financial institution that has grown alongside its community. As an FDIC-insured institution, deposits are backed by the full faith and credit of the U.S. Government, providing standard consumer protections.

The bank offers a range of consumer banking products including deposit accounts with competitive rates comparable to larger financial institutions, personal debit cards branded with MasterCard, and online banking access with mobile check deposit functionality. They provide loan products, though specific loan types, terms, and rates are not detailed on the homepage. Additional services include ATM access and digital banking tools designed for convenience and accessibility.

First State Bank of Livingston differentiates itself through its community-focused positioning and long operational history. The bank emphasizes personal service and local decision-making, which are typical advantages of community banks compared to large national chains. Their mobile deposit feature and online banking platform indicate investment in modern banking technology while maintaining a local presence.

As a traditional community bank, First State Bank of Livingston is best suited for customers seeking FDIC-insured deposit products and basic banking services in the Livingston area. The website provides limited detail on loan terms, rates, or specialized financial products, making it difficult to assess competitive positioning on pricing or specific lending programs. Prospective customers would need to contact the bank directly for detailed information about loan products, interest rates, and fees.
services: Consumer deposit accounts with competitive rates
Online banking platform with username login
Online bill payment (referenced in check-cashing category)
pros: FDIC-insured deposits backed by U.S. Government
Over 110 years of operational history and community presence since 1910
Mobile check deposit available 24/7 from phone
MasterCard-branded personal debit cards for dual debit/credit usage
Competitive deposit account rates comparable to larger institutions
Online banking platform with login access
ATM safety resources and financial education materials
cons: Website lacks specific information on loan products, rates, terms, and eligibility requirements
Limited details on deposit account types, minimum balances, or fee structures
No information about business banking, investment services, or wealth management products
Geographic limitation as community bank serving primarily Livingston, TX area
Minimal transparency on current APYs and promotional offers
best_for: Livingston, TX residents seeking local banking relationships and FDIC-insured deposits
Customers who prefer community banks with personal service over large national chains
Users wanting mobile check deposit convenience with traditional banking security
diagnosis: First State Bank of Livingston is appropriate for consumers in the Livingston, TX area seeking traditional FDIC-insured banking with community-focused service. The main caveat is that the website provides insufficient detail on loan products, rates, fees, and account terms—customers must contact the bank directly for pricing and product specifics.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
